arts.ttl: Aston Villa prepare for Tyrone Mings blow after Jacob Ramsey injury comments
arts.sum: After playing Celtic on Wednesday night, Villa are away at Wolves on Saturday (5:30pm). Tyrone Mings is a major doubt to feature for Aston Villa against Celtic on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Sondre Orjasaeter’s club put Celtic straight over transfer target as 'main goal' in endgame made crystal clear
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers is ramping up business and that is said to include the £7million-rated winger.

arts.sum: Middlesbrough are set to sign Celtic youngster Josh Dede for their development squad, the Daily Record (Transfer news… The post Middlesbrough set to sign versatile Celtic talent appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: John McGinn DESPERATE to face Celtic reveals Aston Villa insider as skipper brings out his legions for showdown
arts.sum: The Scotland star made a return from a hamstring injury at the weekend and is raring to face his boyhood club

arts.ttl: Aston Villa player gets no catches after fishing for a Premier League move
arts.sum: Last week, Quotidiano Sportivo reported Aston Villa loanee Samuel Iling-Junior was looking to cut short his stint at Bologna. The winger was looking for a Premier League move and talks between the Villans, Bologna and the player’s entourage were ongoing. More information has now emerged about the 21-year-old winger, who could be set to stay The post Aston Villa player gets no catches after fishing for a Premier League move appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: 7 breaking Celtic transfer headlines as Ferguson 'enquiry' launched, rising star on the move and latest on Tierney
arts.sum: It's all happening at Celtic and we've got all the latest headlines in one place as the countdown continues to the window closing

arts.ttl: Barcelona prospect Alex Valle to have Celtic loan cut short amid Serie A move
arts.sum: Alex Valle is set to join Serie A side Como.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery sings the highest of praises for Celtic and fans will absolutely love it
arts.sum: The Villa manager, who has had European success himself in his career, stated ‘we are excited and motivated’ for the Celtic game and how ‘they have won the Champions League as well’, as posted by Aston Villa’s social media account. It’s the final game of the Champions League group phase, Celtic have booked their play-off ticket, and just like their opponents, they can still secure a top-eight and automatic spot.

arts.ttl: Fresh Kieran Tierney to Celtic transfer update issued by Fabrizio Romano
arts.sum: New Kieran Tierney to Celtic transfer update emerges.

arts.ttl: Barcelona youngster agrees to join Cesc Fàbregas’ Como
arts.sum: A member of the loan ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona has agreed to take his talents to Italy, to link up with Cesc Fàbregas’ Como. That’s according to transfer…
